title: The Long Game
author: From: Principles
content: Don't mistake current progress for the end goal. Most strategic gains are realized over years, not weeks.
action: Review your five-year objective and identify the next immediate milestone.

title: Signal vs. Noise
author: From: The Signal and the Noise
content: The world is full of data (noise), but very little of it is information (signal). Filter aggressively.
action: Remove one source of low-value information from your daily intake.

title: The Endowment Effect
author: From: Thinking, Fast and Slow
content: We overvalue what we already own. When evaluating your strategies, ask: 'Would I build this today if I didn't already have it?'
action: Critically re-evaluate the necessity of a legacy process or project.

title: Redundancy for Resilience
author: From: Antifragile
content: Efficiency is the enemy of reliability. Redundancy—having a backup system—is the only way to survive the unknown.
action: Implement a verifiable backup for your most critical project file.

title: Energy Management
author: From: The Power of Full Engagement
content: Time is finite; energy is renewable. Manage your energy, not your time.
action: Align your highest-demand tasks with your peak personal energy hours.
